name: claude-non-dev-pr
description: Plugins that guide non-developers through shipping small, low-risk changes safely.

plugins.name: safe-pr
plugins.description: Guides a non-developer (UX, PM, CS, …) through producing a small, low-risk pull request — content, styling, or a tightly-bounded tweak — gated by a deterministic safety checker and LLM risk assessment, for a developer to review.
